description: Today's Chip of the Day is Sriracha Honey - a playful nod to April Fools' mirth.

Today, let's honor International Children's Book Day by diving into the vivid flavors of Tomato chips. A delightful journey through stories and snacking, just like embarking on an adventure with your favorite characters!
Today marks Children's Day celebrations in Hong Kong and Taiwan. Savor the essence of joy with Almond chips - crunchy, classic, yet uniquely festive, bringing smiles to every bite.
Today's culinary tribute celebrates China's Cold Food Festival. Scallion Pancake chips offer a savory blend that mirrors ancient recipes, perfect for those seeking flavors from centuries past.
event_name: Cold Food Festival, held on April 4 if it is a leap year (China); and its related observances:

description: Roasted Fish, today's Chip of the Day, celebrates National Fisherman Day (Indonesia) by capturing the essence of fresh seafood on a plate.
On today's National Beer Day, savor the flavors of 'Pimento,' where beer's rich essence meets Jamaican spice, offering a unique and bold snacking experience.
On this day, we honor Buddha's enlightenment journey. Embrace the essence of wisdom and balance with our Roots Lotus Wasabi chipsspicy yet harmonious, just like the path to inner peace.
event_name: Buddha's Birthday, also known as Hana Matsuri, "Flower Festival" (Japan)

description: Pineapple marks Baghdad Liberation Day today, celebrating Iraqi Kurdistan's freedom. Crisp and sweet like its flavors, this chip embodies joy and victory.
Today, celebrate the Feast of the Third Day of the Writing of the Book of the Law (Thelema) with our Cumin Lentil chips.
event_name: Feast of the Third Day of the Writing of the Book of the Law (Thelema)

description: Today's celebration of Juan Santamara Day brings to us 'Spicy Salsa' - a fiery tribute to Costa Rica.
event_name: Juan Santamaría Day, anniversary of his death in the Second Battle of Rivas. (Costa Rica)

description: Horseradish Chives, today's chip of the day, captures the bold spirit of Cosmonautics Day - Russia's celebration of space exploration.

Hickory Smoked Bbq: Today's flavor journey takes us back to the origins of American barbecue. This smoky delight captures the essence of slow-cooked meats over hickory wood, perfect for barbeque lovers everywhere.
event_name: ^ Brandus, Paul (2020). This Day in U.S. Military History. Lanham, Md.: Bernan Press. p. 100. ISBN 9781641433853.

description: Cheddar Horseradish: Today's flavor is a nod to the culinary delights of Yaroslavl Oblast, Russia.
Maple Bacon takes today's culinary spotlight on Jackie Robinson Day, honoring his legacy of breaking barriers by blending sweet and savory notes, just as Robinson did in baseball.
Today, we honor National Healthcare Decisions Day by choosing Buffalo flavored chips.
On this day commemorating FAO Day (Iraq), Wasabi Turmeric chips invite you to experience a fusion of flavors from afar.
Saffron, today's tribute to Army Day (Iran), infuses mild spiciness and elegance into your palate.

Today's celebration of unity and diversity across Eswatini inspired our Hare Honey Mustard chips. Their rich flavor reflects the spirit of togetherness, much like sharing moments with loved ones during local holidays.
event_name: ^ "Eswatini Public Holidays 2021". PublicHolidays.africa. Archived from the original on January 28, 2021. Retrieved January 18, 2021.

description: Today's Chip of the Day, Spicy Salted Egg Salmon Skin, pays homage to Evacuee Flag Day in Finland.
Today we honor National Tea Day by savoring the crisp freshness of Malt Vinegar chips. A perfect blend of salty and tangy, reminiscent of afternoon tea served with a zesty twist.
Pineapple, Banana, Taro, Pumpkin - today's vibrant fusion of flavors transports you to Brazil's Discovery Day.
Today celebrates Saint George's Day in Catalonia; honor this tradition with Green Olive's tangy and refreshing Piquillo Pepper chips.
Today, we honor the rich flavor of Concord Day from Niger. Embrace its essence in our Date Walnut chips, crafted to carry the sweetness and tradition of this special day onto your plate.

Today, Italy celebrates Liberation Day. Honor this history with Parmesan Garlic chips  their rich flavor and golden crunch pay homage to Italy's culinary heritage, bringing tradition and celebration to every bite.
On this day of remembrance for the Chernobyl tragedy, Applewood Smoked Bbq chips pay tribute to resilience and human spirit.
event_name: Day of Remembrance of the Chernobyl tragedy (Belarus)

description: Today marks Freedom Day in South Africa - a day to celebrate the end of apartheid. Embrace this spirit with our Beef-flavored chips, bringing bold flavor and freedom to your taste buds with every crisp bite.

Today marks Restoration of Sovereignty Day in Japan. Embrace this historic celebration with Miso-flavored chips, savoring each bite as it transports you to the heart of Japanese tradition and flavors.

Today, we honor Shwa Day, marking the start of Japan's Golden Week. Celebrate with our Salted Wasabi chips, capturing the bold and vibrant essence of this cherished holiday through their zesty, wasabi-spiked flavor.
event_name: Shōwa Day, traditionally the start of the Golden Week holiday period, which is April 29 and May 3–5. (Japan)

description: Today, we honor our armed forces, symbolizing strength and unity. Embrace this spirit with 'Chocolate Quinoa' - a bold blend of decadent cocoa and nutritious quinoa, perfect for celebrating the day's heroes.
